import{useState,useEffect,useCallback}from'react';import api from'../../utils/api';export const useLogSessions=project=>{const[sessions,setSessions]=useState([]);const[loading,setLoading]=useState(false);const[error,setError]=useState(null);const fetchSessions=useCallback(async()=>{if(!project){setSessions([]);return;}try{setLoading(true);const response=await api.get("/logs/projects/".concat(project,"/sessions"));if(response.data.success){// Sort session mới nhất lên trên
const sorted=response.data.data.sort((a,b)=>{return new Date(b.lastLog)-new Date(a.lastLog);});setSessions(sorted);}setError(null);}catch(err){setError(err.message);console.error('Error fetching sessions:',err);}finally{setLoading(false);}},[project]);useEffect(()=>{fetchSessions();},[fetchSessions]);return{sessions,loading,error,refetch:fetchSessions};};
